expected.notes: SMLLC owned by nonresident alien formed 3+ years ago triggers cumulative Form 5472 penalty warning; is_nra=yes derived from owner_residency=nonresident_alien.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'cumulative_5472_penalty'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.formation_age eq 3_plus_years
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
  - answers.entity_type eq smllc
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
